item.title: Wood Stove for Shop Heating
item.description: Discover how a wood stove can efficiently heat a workshop, providing warmth and comfort while working in cold conditions with a simple and reliable setup.

media:content.media:title: Wood Stove for Shop Heating
media:content.media:description: Discover how a wood stove can efficiently heat a workshop, providing warmth and comfort while working in cold conditions with a simple and reliable setup.

item.title: A Tool for the Ancient Art of Fire Starting
item.description: Explore an ancient fire-starting tool, demonstrating traditional techniques to create sparks, ignite tinder, and connect with the primal art of making fire.

media:content.media:title: A Tool for the Ancient Art of Fire Starting
media:content.media:description: Explore an ancient fire-starting tool, demonstrating traditional techniques to create sparks, ignite tinder, and connect with the primal art of making fire.

item.title: Shepherd’s Axe Part 3: The Finishing Touches
item.description: Part 3 of crafting a Shepherd’s Axe, focusing on the finishing touches, sharpening, and detailing that bring the traditional tool to completion.

media:content.media:title: Shepherd’s Axe Part 3: The Finishing Touches
media:content.media:description: Part 3 of crafting a Shepherd’s Axe, focusing on the finishing touches, sharpening, and detailing that bring the traditional tool to completion.

item.title: Blacksmith Gloves: Protection or Danger?
item.description: Exploring the pros and cons of wearing gloves in the blacksmith shop, weighing personal protection against potential hazards and safety considerations.

media:content.media:title: Blacksmith Gloves: Protection or Danger?
media:content.media:description: Exploring the pros and cons of wearing gloves in the blacksmith shop, weighing personal protection against potential hazards and safety considerations.

item.title: Changing Tires on the PortaBand
item.description: Step-by-step guide to changing the tires on a PortaBand, covering tools, technique, and tips to keep the band saw running smoothly and efficiently.

media:content.media:title: Changing Tires on the PortaBand
media:content.media:description: Step-by-step guide to changing the tires on a PortaBand, covering tools, technique, and tips to keep the band saw running smoothly and efficiently.

item.title: Making Flat Jaw Blacksmithing Tongs
item.description: Learn how to forge flat jaw blacksmithing tongs, showcasing shaping, riveting, and finishing techniques to create durable and functional tools for the forge.

media:content.media:title: Making Flat Jaw Blacksmithing Tongs
media:content.media:description: Learn how to forge flat jaw blacksmithing tongs, showcasing shaping, riveting, and finishing techniques to create durable and functional tools for the forge.

item.title: Forge Welding a Corner
item.description: Watch the process of forge welding a corner joint, demonstrating heat control, hammer technique, and precision to create a strong, seamless bond.

media:content.media:title: Forge Welding a Corner
media:content.media:description: Watch the process of forge welding a corner joint, demonstrating heat control, hammer technique, and precision to create a strong, seamless bond.
